ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON THE PETITION TO WITHDRAW FUNDS FROM A BLOCKED ACCOUNT FOR THE MINOR, KENIA MARCELA CABRERA DELGADO HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-2021 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2021 FOR HEARING ON PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO WITHDRAW MONEY FROM A BLOCKED ACCOUNT FOR THE MINOR, KENIA CABRERRA-DELGADO - CONTINUED TO SEP-30-2021 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 FOR FURTHER HEARING. ALEXIS BEACH, ESQ. APPEARED WITH PETITIONER JUANA MARIA DELGADO LOPEZ, WHO WAS PRESENT AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR THE MINOR, KENIA CABRERRA-DELGADO, WHO WAS ALSO PRESENT. COUNSEL, PETITIONER AND CLAIMANT ALL APPEARED VIA ZOOM. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER PATRICE BANAISA ASSISTED MS. DELGADO LOPEZ DURING THIS MORNING'S HEARING. COUNSEL TO BRIEF THE ISSUE OF THE LEGAL BASIS TO RELEASE THE REQUESTED MONEY TO THE MINOR. THE COURT WANTS A GUARANTEE THAT THE MONEY SHALL BE USED FOR THE REQUESTED PURPOSE, AND NOT SPENT ALL AT ONE TIME. ADDITIONALLY, COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE A BUDGET, INDICATING HOW THE MONEY WILL BE DISBURSED. LASTLY, BRIEF AND BUDGET SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT WITHIN THIRTY DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3680. EMAIL: GCASEY@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)
